name: Google Sheets
description: Google's collaborative online spreadsheet editor in the Google Workspace suite for real-time data analysis.

years.notes: Skeuomorphic dark-green spreadsheet mark with folded corner and table grid. Used from the 2014 refinement of the original 2012 logo through the October 2020 Workspace rebrand. Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox via transform=scale(0.36923) over the native 47.333×65.083 source; intermediate masks and 1-pixel-scale gradient highlights were dropped.

Flat Material rebrand introduced with Google Workspace on October 6, 2020. Brighter green body, dark-green folded corner, plain white grid. Redrawn into a 24×24 viewBox via transform=scale(0.27273) over the native 64×88 source.

2026 Workspace refresh — flat green body with a left-side darker green tab and a cyan→green gradient overlay. The corner-fold motif is dropped in favor of an inline white plus-grid mark. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026', exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as a 24×24 SVG_STRING.
